name: fastapi-cache2 (Caching for FastAPI)

auth.notes: Cache backend credentials (Redis URL, etc.) configured in app

performance.notes: Cache hit overhead ~5ms; miss falls through to endpoint handler

agent_readiness.notes: @cache(expire=60) decorator on FastAPI endpoint. FastAPICache.init(RedisBackend(redis), prefix='cache'). Cache backends: Redis, Memcached, InMemory. Automatic cache key from route + query params. Custom key builders. Cache invalidation by namespace. ETag support. Async-native. Works with aiocache backends. Simple drop-in caching for FastAPI routes needing Redis response caching.

gotchas: Older package — less actively maintained (fastapi-cache2 fork more active)
Cache invalidation requires manual namespace clearing
Does not cache Pydantic model response objects automatically
Request body not part of cache key by default
best_when: FastAPI APIs with cacheable GET endpoints
Redis-backed response caching for expensive database queries
avoid_when: Need cache-aside pattern with manual control
summary: fastapi-cache2 adds @cache(expire=60) decorator to FastAPI endpoints. Redis/Memcached/InMemory backends. Automatic cache key from route + params. ETag support. Async-native. Simple drop-in for caching expensive GET responses. Cache invalidation by namespace prefix. Best for FastAPI APIs needing basic response caching.
